arts.ttl: ‘Free hit’: Tottenham could get £25m striker as well as Randal Kolo Muani – journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham are looking to make some attacking additions. Timo Werner isn’t playing well enough for Tottenham, and Werner is likely to be sent back to...

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham interested in signing 'unbelievable' Premier League ace who Harry Kane says is 'really good'
Tottenham drop double early team news hint for Liverpool tie as huge return 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Tottenham take on Liverpool tonight in a Carabao Cup semi-final first leg in, arguably, the biggest game of their season so far. The Sweden international has been Spurs' most important player this season and therefore seems destined for another start, likely in midfield because of Maddison's absence.

arts.ttl: What Ange Postecoglou has said about Marcus Rashford to Tottenham transfer as loan move mooted
arts.sum: The England star has fallen out of favour at Manchester United and looks set to move on, despite new boss Ruben Amorim suggesting he still had a future at the club. Rashford has been linked with a number of clubs in the January transer window so far, with the player's representatives thought to be out in Italy discussing a potential loan move to AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Elon Musk's reasons for wanting to buy Liverpool emerge as dad explains club connection
arts.sum: Elon Musk is interested in buying Liverpool from current owners Fenway Sports Group and his father, Errol, has explained the controversial billionaire's connection to the club and the city

arts.ttl: Elon Musk's jaw-dropping net worth after dad admits his desire to buy Liverpool
arts.sum: Speculation of Elon Musk buying Liverpool Football Club has been fuelled by his dad's admission that the richest man on the planet does harbour hope of one day becoming owner

arts.ttl: Fulham contact Kia Joorabchian for signing but Tottenham could ruin their plans
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz has been linked with the likes of Manchester City and Aston Villa in the past few days and it now seems as if Fulham and Tottenham Hotspur are credible candidates to land the Juventus midfielder. Tuttosport, as relayed by Tuttomercatoweb, have reported that it is Fulham who have come forward in a concrete The post Fulham contact Kia Joorabchian for signing but Tottenham could ruin their plans appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Tottenham want Marcus Rashford on loan from Man United but face competition from other European giants to sign wantaway star
arts.sum: Spurs are looking to bolster their attacking options and rescue their season despite being the second-top scorers in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: ‘Simple as that’: The role Fabio Paratici currently has at Tottenham Hotspur – journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s recruitment structure is very difficult to figure out at times. Daniel Levy is, of course, the head honcho at Spurs, and he signs...

arts.ttl: Tottenham injuries: Every player out for semi-final clash with Liverpool
arts.sum: Elsewhere, Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Ben Davies are all absent at centre-back, while Destiny Udogie is out for the long-term having recently sustained a hamstring injury. Fortunately for Postecoglou, Tottenham don't have any injury issues in midfield, but they will be without James Maddison and Pape Matar Sarr on Wednesday evening.
